themes.title: Trump’s policies dominate global right-wing coverage
themes.blurb: Right-wing and far-right media across multiple countries continue to focus intensely on former U.S. President Donald Trump’s policies, diplomatic engagements, and domestic initiatives. This theme reflects Trump’s enduring influence on transnational right-wing narratives, particularly around trade, immigration, and military engagements.

countries.name: 🇺🇸 MAGA / Trump
countries.note: Extensive coverage of Trump’s China visit, border policies, and domestic economic measures like tariffs and deregulation.

countries.name: 🇵🇱 Prawo i Sprawiedliwość
countries.note: Focus on Trump’s China summit and its implications for U.S.-Poland relations, particularly regarding Taiwan and Iran.

countries.name: 🇮🇹 Fratelli d'Italia / Lega
countries.note: Coverage of Trump’s foreign policy, including his stance on Iran and China, and its impact on Italy’s defense and economic strategies.

countries.name: 🇦🇷 La Libertad Avanza
countries.note: Emphasis on Trump’s economic policies and their parallels with Milei’s reforms, particularly deregulation and anti-corruption efforts.

countries.name: 🇫🇷 Rassemblement National
countries.note: Discussion of Trump’s immigration policies and their resonance with RN’s national priority agenda.

countries.name: 🇬🇧 Reform UK
countries.note: Coverage of Trump’s influence on Reform UK’s anti-immigration and anti-fraud policies, as well as his diplomatic engagements.

themes.title: Far-right parties push 'national priority' policies
themes.blurb: Right-wing and far-right parties in Europe and Latin America are increasingly advocating for 'national priority' policies, which prioritize citizens over immigrants in access to social benefits, housing, and employment. This theme highlights a shared rhetorical and policy framework across borders, often tied to anti-immigration sentiment.

countries.name: 🇪🇸 Vox
countries.note: Vox’s campaign in Andalusia emphasizes 'national priority' in housing, healthcare, and social benefits, positioning itself as the defender of Spanish citizens.

countries.name: 🇮🇹 Fratelli d'Italia / Lega
countries.note: Meloni’s government prioritizes Italian citizens in welfare policies, echoing Vox’s rhetoric and aligning with broader European far-right trends.

countries.name: 🇸🇪 Sverigedemokraterna
countries.note: Advocates for prioritizing Swedish citizens in welfare and housing policies, mirroring Vox’s 'national priority' agenda.

countries.name: 🇫🇷 Rassemblement National
countries.note: RN’s policies focus on prioritizing French citizens in social benefits and housing, aligning with Vox’s and Fratelli d'Italia’s agendas.

countries.name: 🇳🇴 Fremskrittspartiet
countries.note: Proposes stricter immigration controls and prioritizes Norwegian citizens in welfare policies, reflecting broader far-right trends.

countries.name: 🇦🇷 La Libertad Avanza
countries.note: Milei’s government adopts rhetoric emphasizing Argentine citizens’ priority in economic policies, echoing European far-right narratives.

themes.title: Corruption scandals rock far-right governments
themes.blurb: Corruption allegations and scandals are dominating coverage of far-right governments and leaders across multiple countries. This theme reflects a pattern of parallel scrutiny, with media and opposition parties highlighting financial improprieties, conflicts of interest, and ethical violations.

countries.name: 🇦🇷 La Libertad Avanza
countries.note: Manuel Adorni faces multiple investigations for alleged illicit enrichment, luxury travel, and undeclared assets, overshadowing Milei’s economic agenda.

countries.name: 🇭🇺 Fidesz / Tisza
countries.note: The new Tisza government investigates past corruption under Orbán’s Fidesz, including misuse of public funds and opaque defense contracts.

countries.name: 🇵🇱 Prawo i Sprawiedliwość
countries.note: Zbigniew Ziobro faces 26 charges of corruption and embezzlement, prompting his flight to the U.S. and asylum claims.

countries.name: 🇪🇸 Vox
countries.note: Internal disputes and allegations of financial impropriety, including misuse of party funds and opaque donations, dominate coverage.

countries.name: 🇺🇸 MAGA / Trump
countries.note: Trump administration officials face scrutiny over ties to Jeffrey Epstein, undeclared gifts, and conflicts of interest.

themes.title: Far-right parties exploit immigration tensions
themes.blurb: Far-right parties across Europe and the Americas are leveraging immigration as a central campaign issue, framing it as a threat to national identity, security, and economic stability. This theme highlights a shared rhetorical strategy and policy focus, often tied to electoral campaigns.

countries.name: 🇪🇸 Vox
countries.note: Vox’s Andalusia campaign focuses on anti-immigration policies, including opposition to regularization and demands for stricter border controls.

countries.name: 🇫🇷 Rassemblement National
countries.note: RN’s policies emphasize stricter immigration controls and prioritizing French citizens in welfare and housing, aligning with broader far-right narratives.

countries.name: 🇩🇪 Alternative für Deutschland
countries.note: AfD’s platform centers on anti-immigration policies, including opposition to asylum seekers and calls for stricter deportation laws.

countries.name: 🇬🇧 Reform UK
countries.note: Reform UK’s campaign focuses on reducing immigration, stricter border controls, and opposition to asylum seekers.

countries.name: 🇳🇴 Fremskrittspartiet
countries.note: FrP’s policies emphasize stricter immigration controls, including opposition to family reunification for immigrants with criminal records.

countries.name: 🇮🇹 Fratelli d'Italia / Lega
countries.note: Meloni’s government prioritizes stricter immigration controls, including opposition to migrant regularization and calls for stronger border security.

themes.title: Right-wing leaders face internal party divisions
themes.blurb: Internal divisions within right-wing and far-right parties are intensifying, with factions clashing over leadership, policy direction, and electoral strategies. This theme reflects a broader pattern of instability and infighting, often tied to leadership challenges and ideological disputes.

countries.name: 🇵🇱 Prawo i Sprawiedliwość
countries.note: PiS faces internal conflicts between factions loyal to Kaczyński, Morawiecki, and Ziobro, with disputes over leadership and policy direction.

countries.name: 🇪🇸 Vox
countries.note: Vox experiences internal disputes, including expulsions and resignations, over leadership and policy disagreements.

countries.name: 🇮🇹 Fratelli d'Italia / Lega
countries.note: Meloni’s coalition faces tensions with Lega and Forza Italia over policy priorities, including defense spending and immigration.

countries.name: 🇬🇧 Reform UK
countries.note: Reform UK faces internal divisions over leadership and policy direction, including disputes over Nigel Farage’s influence.

countries.name: 🇭🇺 Fidesz / Tisza
countries.note: The new Tisza government faces internal disputes over policy direction and leadership, including tensions with former Fidesz officials.
